pageContext.name: Black Templars Outriders Bike
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Black Templars Outriders Bike Collectible Figure!  Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators. This Black Templar Outrider Bike is a great addition to any Ultramarines figure (sold separately).  Don't miss your chance to add this to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
